ModOutputs R6 Class

Source: R/ModOutputs.R
ModOutputs.Rd

Main content area with KPI value boxes and 5 demo tabs showcasing different tooltip/hover-info approaches. Uses R6 for object-oriented Shiny module design.

Methods

Public methods

  • ModOutputs$new()

  • ModOutputs$ui()

  • ModOutputs$server()

  • ModOutputs$clone()

ModOutputs$new()

Initialize a new ModOutputs instance

Usage

ModOutputs$new(id = "outputs")

Arguments

id

Character. Module namespace id.

ModOutputs$ui()

Build main content UI

Usage

ModOutputs$ui()

Returns

A shiny::tagList() with KPI boxes and demo tabs

ModOutputs$server()

Initialize server logic

Usage

ModOutputs$server(inputs_r)

Arguments

inputs_r

Reactive list returned by ModInputs$server()

Returns

Reactive tibble with performance metrics

ModOutputs$clone()

The objects of this class are cloneable with this method.

Usage

ModOutputs$clone(deep = FALSE)

Arguments

deep

Whether to make a deep clone.

Examples

if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{
# In app_ui():
outputs <- ModOutputs$new(id = "outputs")
outputs$ui()

# In app_server():
outputs <- ModOutputs$new(id = "outputs")
perf_r <- outputs$server(inputs_r)
} # }
